agency.gdpr.intro2: This page is intended to explain what the rules are, how they apply to your use of the HighLevel platform and the steps we have taken to comply.
agency.gdpr.intro3: You should review this document in conjunction with our Privacy Policy and contact a specialist legal professional if you require more information or advice.
agency.gdpr.regulation2: The GDPR is focused on giving individuals more control over how their data is used by companies, and making the collection and processing of data more transparent.
agency.gdpr.regulation3: The GDPR was incorporated directly into UK law following the end of the Brexit transition period, meaning that UK businesses still have to comply with its provisions through the ‘UK GDPR’.
agency.gdpr.controllerProcessorObligatio: The GDPR imposes various obligations on a person depending on whether they are a controller or a processor of personal data.
agency.gdpr.legalBasisRequirement: Personal data may only be collected and processed if there is a legal basis for doing so. The allowable legal bases are set out in the GDPR.
agency.gdpr.dataSubjectRights: The GDPR grants data subjects (i.e. your customers) certain rights relating to their personal data, including the right to access, correct and/or delete any data relating to them.
agency.gdpr.transfersToUSA: Transfers of data to the USA
agency.gdpr.securitySafeguards: We have put in place strong security safeguards and measures to ensure that any personal data we hold is stored securely. We regularly test our products for bugs and vulnerabilities.
agency.gdpr.backupSystems: We ensure that we have regular back-up systems in place, and ensure that we have data recovery and data integrity systems and processes to minimize risk of corruption to or loss of personal data.
agency.gdpr.stepsForCompliance: Steps we have taken to ensure GDPR compliance
agency.gdpr.standardContractualClauses: Our data processing agreement utilizes the Standard Contractual Clauses to ensure that you are able to lawfully send personal data to us in the USA.
agency.gdpr.detectBreaches: We are able to detect personal breaches and to inform our customers as soon as possible.
agency.gdpr.dealWithAccessRequests: We are able to deal with subject access requests and rights of erasure requests, and ensure that we inform you when a data subject has made such a request to us.
agency.gdpr.assessedDocumented: We have assessed and documented the personal data processed by us on your behalf.
agency.gdpr.assessedSecurity: We have assessed our security and upgraded this where necessary to ensure that it is appropriate for the level of risk we face in relation to a data breach.

onboardingApp.testimonials.review1: Best onboarding experience. The HighLevel team was helpful and patient, setting up most of my account. Unbelievable experience!”
onboardingApp.testimonials.review2: Impressive onboarding by the HighLevel team. The software delivers everything an agency needs.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review3: The HighLevel team provided clarity on Twillio and outbound calling, helping schedule my onboarding call for optimal setup.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review4: Excellent onboarding call. The HighLevel team assisted with basic setup and taught new tricks. Great stuff!
onboardingApp.testimonials.review5: Great onboarding experience. The HighLevel team provided a detailed walkthrough, helping set up telephony, site, social accounts, and workflows.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review6: Enjoyed my kickoff call! The HighLevel team explained everything amazingly. Highly recommend!
onboardingApp.testimonials.review7: The HighLevel team was patient and helpful, walking me through additional setup beyond the onboarding call. Very knowledgeable and helpful.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review8: Incredible onboarding call with a friendly and knowledgeable HighLevel team. Seamless and enjoyable process.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review9: Impressed with the kickoff call. The HighLevel team spent over an hour showing me everything I needed to know and answered all my questions.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review10: Amazing job on the onboarding kickoff call. The HighLevel team showed me the ins and outs, and I’m excited for the next steps.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review11: Exceptional onboarding assistant from the HighLevel team. Guided me successfully and provided great support throughout.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review12: The HighLevel team answered my questions and double-checked all my settings, ensuring everything was set up correctly.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review13: Incredible signup process with constant support from the HighLevel team. Helpful onboarding call answered all my questions. Highly recommend!
onboardingApp.testimonials.review14: The HighLevel team explained everything in detail and answered all my questions. Grateful for the thorough support!
onboardingApp.testimonials.review15: Excellent service! The HighLevel team answered all my questions and provided great follow-up.
onboardingApp.testimonials.review16: Professional and informative kickoff with the HighLevel team. They were patient and offered a helpful 1-on-1 mentor program.
onboardingApp.implementationTestimonials: The onboarding process was very informative and patient. I struggle with technical tools, but the support was exceptional, providing explanations and resources.
Thorough onboarding session, very helpful and knowledgeable. Thanks for facilitating a smooth onboarding process for my agency.
Top-notch customer service and onboarding. Fast-tracked my setup and saved me so much time! I highly recommend investing in it to get started on the right track.
Blown away by the professionalism and support during onboarding. Excited to use this incredible software for my clients.
Great experience onboarding with advanced CRM integration knowledge. Moved quickly through everything.
Efficient onboarding call answered all my questions in one hour with demos. Impressed with the overall customer service. Feels like a high-end experience.
